source_pr.title: test: fix the CI problem in TestAutoRandomBitsData
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix #14629.

### What is changed and how it works?
Change the assertion logic on table handles that are `AUTO_RANDOM`.
It should be 
```
The shard_bits of handles are not all zero.
```
instead of
```
The shard_bits of each handle are not zero.
```


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes



Side effects


Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

Release note

symptoms: PR body: shard_bits of AUTO_RANDOM handles are not all zero (instead of requiring each handle non-zero).
failure_signature: PR body: shard_bits of AUTO_RANDOM handles are not all zero (instead of requiring each handle non-zero).
fix_pattern: test: fix the CI problem in TestAutoRandomBitsData

evidence: evidence: PR body: shard_bits of AUTO_RANDOM handles are not all zero (instead of requiring each handle non-zero).
evidence: diff changes assertion to track allZero and assert IsFalse, avoiding rare random zero shard bits (executor/ddl_test.go).
